reviews.review_msg: She was a decent professor. She wasnt very good at e-mailing promptly or showing up for her tutorial appointments. Her grading criteria is not clear on paper, but clarified in person. She was caring, but I never felt the need to show up to lectures.

She was a decent professor. She wasnt very good at e-mailing promptly or showing up for her tutorial appointments. Her grading criteria is not clear on paper, but clarified in person. She was caring, but I never felt the need to show up to lectures.

he is a wonderful teacher. He teachers, rather than lectures, to our class of over 200. He draws from our world to help us make connections to the literary works. If you take the time to make lots of notes in your novels, he lets you bring it into the exam. Good incentive for hard work. Attendance not mandatory, but the classes are not dull.
